Turing's environments are developed using R&D-driven standards with transparent and auditable pipelines.

Turing's RL environments can support workflows such as communication (email, messaging), commerce and transactions, scheduling and calendar operations, CRM and sales workflows, customer support, project and task management, and more, depending on your project requirements.
